channel.title: C on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in C on Arrans github.io

item.title: obsproject/obs-studio
item.description: OBS Studio - Free and open source software for live streaming and screen recording

item.title: tree-sitter/tree-sitter
item.description: An incremental parsing system for programming tools

item.title: videolan/vlc
item.description: VLC media player - All pull requests are ignored, please use MRs on https://code.videolan.org/videolan/vlc

item.title: systemd/systemd
item.description: The systemd System and Service Manager

item.title: oz123/awesome-c
item.description: A curated list of awesome C frameworks, libraries, resources and other shiny things. Inspired by all the other awesome-… projects out there.

item.title: lvgl/lvgl
item.description: Embedded graphics library to create beautiful UIs for any MCU, MPU and display type.

item.title: hashcat/hashcat
item.description: World’s fastest and most advanced password recovery utility

item.title: leo-arch/clifm
item.description: The shell-like, command line terminal file manager: simple, fast, extensible, and lightweight as hell.

item.description: ksh 93u+m: KornShell lives! | Latest release: https://github.com/ksh93/ksh/releases

item.title: media-kit/media-kit
item.description: A cross-platform video player & audio player for Flutter & Dart.

item.description: Perhaps the smallest useful terminal multiplexer in the world.

item.description: MetaCall: The ultimate polyglot programming experience.

item.description: Classic overhead run-and-gun game

item.title: etlegacy/etlegacy
item.description: ET: Legacy is an open source project based on the code of Wolfenstein: Enemy Territory which was released in 2010 under the terms of the GPLv3 license.

item.description: µTox the lightest and fluffiest Tox client

item.description: A plugin for VLC to add “seen” to the xdg.tags list automatically when ever you watch anything
